name: install.sh
description: Installs git hooks by routing this worktree to .githooks via worktree-local core.hooksPath

name: server-manager.js
description: Manages Mintlify dev server lifecycle for browser tests (start/stop/health-check)
pipeline: manual — legacy browser-validation module imported by .githooks/verify-browser.js

name: verify-browser.js
description: Verifies browser availability for Puppeteer-based integration tests

name: verify.sh
description: Pre-commit sub-hook — verifies file-walker is available and runs structural checks on staged files

name: audit-component-usage.js
description: Component usage auditor — scans pages for component usage patterns and reports statistics

name: scan-component-imports.js
description: Scans MDX imports to produce component-usage-map.json and detect @usedIn drift.

name: audit-copy-patterns.js
description: Aggregate copy pattern violations across a tab or full v2 tree and emit a diagnostic report.

name: audit-media-assets.js
description: Audits repo media assets, references, ignore leakage, and externalized asset branch inventory.
pipeline: manual — diagnostic/investigation tool, run on-demand only

name: audit-python.py
description: Python audit utility — runs Python-based audit checks (alternative to Node auditors)

name: audit-v2-usefulness.js
description: Usefulness auditor — scores v2 MDX pages on human and agent usefulness with source-weighted 2026 accuracy verification
pipeline: manual — diagnostic/investigation tool, run on-demand only

name: docs-quality-and-freshness-audit.js
description: Content freshness audit — checks for TODO/TBD/Coming Soon markers, thin pages, stale content

name: generate-content-gap-reconciliation.js
description: Content-gap reconciliation generator — compares blueprint coverage against v2 MDX and writes reconciliation artefacts

name: terminology-search.js
description: Terminology search — searches glossary/terminology data for definitions

name: style-and-language-homogenizer-en-gb.js
description: EN-GB style homogeniser — finds and fixes American English spellings, style guide violations, and formatting inconsistencies across v2 content

name: docs-page-research.js
description: Docs page research runner — extracts factual claims from docs pages, checks evidence sources, detects contradictions across related pages, and emits manual-first research reports.

name: docs-research-adjudication.js
description: Docs research adjudication ledger — validates, records, and summarizes measured review outcomes for the page-content research workflow so trust decisions are based on real usage rather than intuition.

name: audit-tasks-folders.js
description: Tasks folder auditor — checks workspace/ structure, normalises report locations, applies recommendations with conflict-safe moves

name: generate-v2-folder-governance-cleanup-matrix.js
description: V2 folder governance cleanup matrix generator — inventories non-publishable and legacy v2 artifacts and emits human-review markdown/json recommendations before any moves are applied.

name: audit-script-categories.js
description: Script auditor — analyses all repo scripts, categorises usage/overlap, generates SCRIPT_AUDIT reports
pipeline: manual — diagnostic/investigation tool, run on-demand only

name: script-footprint-and-usage-audit.js
description: Script footprint auditor — analyses script file sizes, dependencies, and usage patterns across the repo

name: cross-agent-packager.js
description: Cross-agent packager — bundles audit reports and repo state into agent-consumable packages

name: export-portable-skills.js
description: Portable skills exporter — copies canonical template skills into cross-agent pack folders and validates drift.

name: sync-codex-skills.js
description: Codex skills sync — synchronises skill definition files and managed companion resources between canonical templates and local Codex installs. Supports --check mode.

name: lock-release.js
description: Codex lock release utility — releases stale codex lock files
pipeline: manual — interactive developer tool, not suited for automated pipelines

name: task-cleanup.js
description: Codex task cleanup utility — reports and prunes merged clean worktrees plus stale local codex branches after merge
pipeline: manual — interactive developer tool, not suited for automated pipelines

name: task-preflight.js
description: Codex task preflight — generates task setup files and validates preconditions
pipeline: manual — codex setup tool referenced by .githooks/pre-commit guidance, not auto-executed

name: fetch-external-docs.sh
description: External docs fetcher — pulls doc fragments from external GitHub repos into snippets/data/ for inclusion in builds

name: fetch-lpt-exchanges.sh
description: LPT exchange data fetcher — pulls exchange listing data for LPT token pages

name: fetch-openapi-specs.sh
description: OpenAPI spec fetcher — pulls latest OpenAPI specs from Livepeer services for reference pages

name: convert-rss-to-mdx.js
description: RSS-to-MDX converter — imports RSS feed items and converts to MDX page format

name: generate-localized-docs-json.js
description: Locale docs.json generator — produces localised docs.json variants from route-map and source docs.json

name: translate-docs.js
description: Translation generator — translates v2 MDX pages to target languages via OpenRouter API

name: validate-generated.js
description: Generated localisation validator — checks generated translated MDX files and route-map outputs for integrity

name: publish-v2-internal-reports.js
description: Report publisher — publishes v2 internal audit reports to configured output locations
scope: operations/scripts, tools/config, v2/internal, docs.json, workspace/reports, operations/tests/eports

name: docs-path-sync.js
description: Shared docs path sync library — detects staged page moves, plans deterministic route rewrites, and applies governed docs.json/path reference updates.

name: og-image-policy.js
description: OG image policy helper — resolves authored MDX pages to canonical section or fallback social images and metadata.
pipeline: manual — library module imported by generators and validators

name: check-codex-pr-overlap.js
description: PR enforcer — checks for conflicting codex PRs targeting the same files/branches

name: codex-commit.js
description: Codex commit helper — audits codex branch state and generates compliant commit messages

name: create-codex-pr.js
description: Codex PR creator — generates codex PR with correct branch naming, labels, and body template

name: task-finalise.js
description: Codex task finaliser — enforces task completion requirements before closing
pipeline: manual — interactive developer tool, not suited for automated pipelines

name: docs-page-research-pr-report.js
description: Docs page research PR report — runs the fact-check research runner on changed docs pages and emits an advisory PR artifact summarizing claim families, contradictions, unresolved factual risk, and propagation follow-up.
pipeline: manual — experimental advisory PR integration, non-blocking

name: docs-research-packet.js
description: Docs research packet generator — derives nav, manifest, or explicit path scope; runs the research stack tranche-by-tranche; and writes reusable packet reports plus a master rollup.
pipeline: manual — packet generator for research review tranches

name: orchestrator-guides-research-review.js
description: Orchestrator guides research review packet wrapper — delegates to the generic docs-research-packet engine with the live Orchestrators Guides nav scope and legacy default output root.

name: governance-pipeline.js
description: Chains audit, safe repair, verification, and reporting into a single self-healing governance pipeline.

name: sync-generated-files.js
description: Dispatches generator scripts to sync generated catalog/index files, then validates banners.

name: repo-audit-orchestrator.js
description: Repo audit orchestrator — dispatches all static analysis validators in sequence. Supports --mode (static/full), --scope (full/changed), --quarantine, --agent-pack.

name: generate-llms-files.js
description: LLMs file generator — produces llms.txt and llms-full.txt for AI consumption. Dual-mode: --check / --write.

name: generate-component-docs.js
description: Generates published component library MDX pages from the registry. Replaces update-component-library.sh.

name: generate-component-registry.js
description: Parses JSDoc from all component exports and produces component-registry.json.
pipeline: manual, P3, P5, P6, manual, manual

name: generate-ui-templates.js
description: Generates the UI template catalog, template preview routes, and VS Code snippets from canonical template/component sources
pipeline: manual — interactive developer tool, not suited for automated pipelines

name: generate-docs-index.js
description: Docs index generator — produces docs-index.json from v2 frontmatter and docs.json. Dual-mode: --check (enforcer) / --write (generator). Most-called script in the repo.

name: generate-pages-index.js
description: Pages index generator — generates and verifies section-style index.mdx files for v2 docs folders plus root aggregate index

name: generate-api-docs.sh
description: API docs generator — generates API reference pages from OpenAPI specs

name: generate-glossary.js
description: Glossary generator — produces glossary data file from terminology sources

name: generate-ai-sitemap.js
description: AI sitemap generator — produces AI-optimised sitemap files. Dual-mode: --check (enforcer) / --write (generator).

name: generate-og-images.js
description: Generate canonical site-level Open Graph image assets and manifest for fallback and section-level social previews.
pipeline: manual — run when OG assets, section labels, or branding change

name: generate-ai-skills-indexes.js
description: Generates ai-tools/ai-skills inventory.json and content-map.md from the canonical agent-governance surface manifest.
scope: operations/scripts, ai-tools/ai-skills, AGENTS.md, .github, .claude, .cursor, .windsurf, docs-guide/policies, contribute, v2

name: generate-docs-guide-components-index.js
description: Generates components-catalog.mdx in docs-guide/catalog/ from component-registry.json and component-usage-map.json.

name: generate-docs-guide-indexes.js
description: Generates docs-guide workflow/template catalogs and optionally verifies freshness

name: generate-docs-guide-pages-index.js
description: Generates the docs-guide pages catalog

name: generate-script-registry.js
description: Derives tools/config/script-registry.json from JSDoc headers across all governed
policy: JSDoc headers are source of truth (doc-recommendation.md Q2). Never hand-edit output.

name: generate-ai-tools-inventory.js
description: Generates the AI tools inventory report from the registry. Split from validate-ai-tools-registry.js.

name: new-script.js
description: ${params.summary}`,
pipeline: manual — interactive developer tool, not suited for automated pipelines',

name: repair-component-metadata.js
description: Auto-repairs derived JSDoc metadata fields from repo state. Safe fields only. Mirrors AUDIT-00 --fix pattern for components.

name: add-framework-headers.js
description: Inserts or extends framework headers on all repo scripts from classification data.
pipeline: manual — interactive developer tool, not suited for automated pipelines

name: add-pagetype-mechanical.js
description: Mechanically assigns pageType frontmatter to eligible v2 MDX pages.
pipeline: manual — deterministic metadata rollout utility for v2 docs

name: assign-purpose-metadata.js
description: Purpose metadata assigner — fills purpose and audience frontmatter for routable v2 pages
pipeline: manual — interactive developer tool, not suited for automated pipelines

name: migrate-assets-to-branch.js
description: Reads the media-audit manifest, migrates flagged assets to docs-v2-assets, and rewrites MDX/JSX references to raw GitHub URLs.

name: quarantine-manager.js
description: Quarantine manager — classifies files for quarantine (default) or applies quarantine moves (--apply)

name: repair-mdx-safe-markdown.js
description: Auto-repairs deterministic MDX-unsafe markdown patterns across first-party markdown and MDX content.

name: repair-spelling.js
description: Auto-corrects spelling errors using the shared cspell configuration. Safe, dictionary-based corrections only.

name: sync-docs-paths.js
description: Docs path sync remediator — applies deterministic docs.json and governed reference rewrites for moved docs pages.

name: generate-seo.js
description: SEO generator — generates SEO metadata (title, description, keywords) for v2 pages from content analysis

name: repair-ownerless-language.js
description: Applies deterministic wording repairs that remove human-owner dependency from governed GitHub and contributor surfaces.

name: wcag-repair-common.js
description: WCAG repair shared logic — common repair functions used by WCAG audit fix mode

name: update-jsdoc-headers.js
purpose: Rewrite JSDoc headers in all scripts to the 11-tag standard
description: One-time migration script that reads JSDoc headers across all
policy: dry-run by default; --write to apply changes

name: repair-script-inventory.js
description: Repairs script headers and classification data. Thin wrapper that runs audit-script-inventory with --fix. Split from audit-script-inventory.js.

name: check-no-ai-stash.sh
description: AI stash enforcer — blocks push if AI temporary/stash files are present in working tree

name: validate-locks.js
description: Codex lock validator — checks for stale or conflicting lock files before push

name: check-component-docs.js
description: Validates component JSDoc coverage, prop documentation, docs-entry coverage, and governance metadata.

name: check-component-css.js
description: Validates component files against component governance styling rules.
pipeline: manual → component .jsx files → exit-code, stdout:violations; --fix → component .jsx files → CSS token replacements, P3

name: check-mdx-component-scope.js
description: Validates MDX-facing component modules do not depend on private file-scope helper bindings from exported components.

name: check-naming-conventions.js
description: Validates active component filenames against directory-aware file naming and PascalCase exports under snippets/components.

name: component-layout-governance.js
description: Component layout governance validator — checks v2 page layouts against approved component contracts

name: lint-copy.js
description: Enforce banned word and phrase rules on MDX content files.

name: lint-patterns.js
description: Enforce Tier 2 copy pattern rules on MDX content files.

name: check-grammar-en-gb.js
description: Deterministic UK English grammar checker for prose content with optional conservative autofix for safe rules.
pipeline: manual → staged .mdx files → exit-code, stdout:violations; --fix → staged .mdx files → edited files/CI validator for English v2 docs and explicit content files

name: check-proper-nouns.js
description: Detects and fixes incorrect proper noun capitalisation in prose while skipping code, frontmatter, URLs, and path-like tokens.
pipeline: manual → staged .mdx files → exit-code, stdout:violations; --fix → staged .mdx files → edited files

name: check-anchor-usage.js
description: Validates same-page anchor links in maintained v2 MDX files against heading IDs on the same page

name: check-description-quality.js
description: Validates English v2 frontmatter descriptions for SEO length, boilerplate openings, and duplicate reuse
pipeline: manual — diagnostic/investigation tool, run on-demand only

name: check-docs-path-sync.js
description: Docs path sync validator — detects staged page moves that require docs.json or governed path reference rewrites.

name: check-double-headers.js
description: Detects duplicate body H1 headings and opening paragraphs that repeat frontmatter title or description content.
pipeline: manual → staged .mdx files → exit-code, stdout:violations; --fix → staged .mdx files → edited files

name: check-mdx-safe-markdown.js
description: Validates first-party markdown and MDX content for repo-wide MDX-safe syntax, including parse failures and deterministic unsafe patterns.

name: check-page-endings.js
description: Validates that English v2 MDX pages end with an approved navigational or closing element
pipeline: manual → staged .mdx files → exit-code, stdout:violations; --fix → staged .mdx files → TODO comment appended, ci

name: enforce-generated-file-banners.js
description: Validates "do not edit" banners and i18n parity on generated MDX files. Generator dispatch split to sync-generated-files.js.

name: lint-structure.js
description: Enforce structural rules on MDX content files.

name: verify-all-pages.js
description: Loads component-library routes in a headless browser and fails on render, console, or 404 issues.

name: docs-fact-registry.js
description: Docs fact registry validator — validates repo-native research claim registries and provides normalized claim-family data for the manual research runner.

name: check-agent-docs-freshness.js
description: Validates that canonical agent governance docs and native adapters exist and have been touched within a freshness threshold

name: review-governance-repair-checklist.js
description: Generates a review checklist for dry-run governance repair proposals that require human approval before fix mode is applied.

name: validate-ai-tools-registry.js
description: AI-tools registry validator and report writer for source-of-truth coverage, lifecycle, lane alignment, and generated inventory output.

name: validate-codex-task-contract.js
description: Codex task contract enforcer — validates branch naming, task files, PR body, and issue state for codex branches

name: verify-pay-orc-gate-finalize.sh
description: Payment/orchestrator gate verifier — checks payment and orchestrator documentation gate conditions

name: audit-script-inventory.js
description: Deep inventory audit of every script in the repo. Traces triggers, outputs, downstream chains, and governance compliance. Produces reports grouped by trigger category.

name: check-component-immutability.js
description: Flags modifications to existing component files in PR context. New files allowed. Modifications require approval label.

name: check-pr-template.js
description: Enforces that PR descriptions include required change and rationale sections before merge

name: docs-page-research-pr-report.test.js
pipeline: manual — experimental advisory PR integration, non-blocking

name: og-image-policy.test.js
pipeline: manual — targeted unit coverage for OG image governance

name: ownerless-governance.test.js
scope: tests/unit, tests/utils, tests/WHEN-TESTS-RUN.md, docs-guide, tools/config/ownerless-governance-surfaces.json, AGENTS.md, .allowlist, .github, .claude, .cursor, .windsurf, README.md, contribute/CONTRIBUTING/AGENT-INSTRUCTIONS.md

name: v2-internal-report-pages.js
pipeline: manual — interactive developer tool, not suited for automated pipelines

name: ai-tools-registry.js
pipeline: indirect -- library module used by validator and test surfaces
